## Type of change

- [ ] New language feature / construct

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet test` is green locally
- [ ] No target-specific (C#, TypeScript, …) concept leaked into `Ast/`
- [ ] Added/updated tests (`R##…Tests.cs`) with snapshot + Roslyn-compile coverage where relevant
- [ ] Reviewed and intentionally accepted any changed Verify snapshots (`.received.txt` diffs)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `website/` reference docs if a construct's emitted shape changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
